info.title: MAM API V2
info.description: Workspace ONE UEM MAM REST API V2

get.summary: New - Get assignment rule for an application.
get.description: Get assignment rule which contains deployment parameters for assignments and smart group exclusions for an application.

parameters.name: applicationUuid
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the application.
            Accepted formats **uuid**
            E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073(Required)

400.description: 1. {6 : Application Uuid cannot be null or empty.}

404.description: 1. {7000 : Application not found or user does not have access to it.}

put.summary: New - Updates assignment rule for an application and publishes the application to the devices associated with assignment rule.
put.description: Updates assignments with assignment policies and exclusions for an application. Publishes the application to the devices associated with the assignment rule.

parameters.name: applicationUuid
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the application.
            Accepted formats **uuid**
            E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073(Required)

parameters.name: assignmentRule
parameters.description: Assignment rule which contains list of assignments and exclusions for an application.(Required)

400.description: 1. {6 : The assigned and excluded smartgroups should not be same.} 2. {6 :  Priority of the assignments should be in ascending order with priority starting from 0.} 3. {6 : Per App VPN profile Uuid provided is not applicable for this application.} 4. {6 : AFW Per App VPN profile Uuid provided is not applicable for this application.}5. {6 : Smart groups provided is not applicable for this application.} 6. {6 : Smart groups should be part of offline licenses, online licenses or in both for BSP application.}7. {6 : Smart groups should not be empty for assignments.}8. {6 : App config keys should not be repeated.} 9. {6 : Enter valid app config keys.} 10. {6 : Incorrect app config value provided for the given type.}11. {6 : Enter valid application transform uuid applicable for the provided Windows SFD apps.} 12. {6: Smart groups added should not repeat between assignments or exclusions for BSP application.}13. {7112: Only licenced purchased applications are supported through API.} 14. {7113: Duplicate smart groups cannot be passed.} 15. {7114: Cannot allocate more than {0} Licenses.}16. {6: VPP assignments should not be empty for purchased applications.} 17. {6: Invalid smart groups added.} 18. {6. Smart groups added should not repeat between assignments or exclusions.}19. {8061 : Assignment cannot be removed for an app which is part of a workflow.} 20. {7002: Application profile mapping provided is not valid.}

403.description: 1. {1011 : User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

422.description: 1. {1012 : Assignments should be present if excluded smartgroups are provided} 2. {1012 : The Priority field is required.}

500.description: 1. {200011 : Application publish failed, Please republish the Application}

get.summary: New - Get app config template for an application.
get.description: Get list of app configs supported for an application based on the application uuid provided.

parameters.name: applicationUuid
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the application.
            Accepted formats **uuid**
            example: 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073(Required).

parameters.name: organization_group_uuid
parameters.description:
Current Organization Group identifier for which admin is trying to get the template and from where assigment of the given app will happen. Accepted formats **uuid**
            example: 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073

403.description: 1. {5143: The given organization group is not accessible} 2. {1011 : User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.}

422.description: 1012 - Unprocessable Entity   1. {1012: Current Organization group must be a valid guid.} 2. {10036: Android for work is not enabled for this ManagedLocationGroup.}

delete.summary: New - Deletes a blob by Guid

parameters.name: blobId
parameters.description: Identifier of the blob to be deleted(Required)

403.description: 1.{11: User is not authorized to delete the requested blob.}

head.summary: New - Gets a blob contents information by the Guid
head.description: Returns the information for blob contents

parameters.name: blobId
parameters.description: Identifier of the blob to be retrieved(Required)

Accept-Ranges.description: If present it means that the file supports partial download and it can be requested using byte range header on GET API.

403.description: 1.{11: User is not authorized to get contents information for the requested blob.}

post.summary: New - Create a new blob with attached file
post.description:
- Create a new blob with attached file
- Supported file types are 'ipa',
  'apk', 'xap', 'appx', 'msi', 'app', 'zip', 'xml', 'pem', 'exe', 'pkg',
  'dmg', 'plist', 'mpkg', 'js', 'jse', 'ps1', 'ps1xml', 'psc1', 'psd1',
  'psm1', 'pssc', 'cdxml', 'vbs', 'vbe', 'wsf', 'wsc', 'msp', 'mst',
  'p12', 'pfx', 'p7b', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'png', 'gif', 'bmp', 'p7m', 'ppkg', 'cat', 'apf'
- No size restrictions
- Organization Group will be set to Global irrespective of value passed if the file type is of 'apf'

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: Name of the file being uploaded(Required)

parameters.name: organizationGroupId
parameters.description: Organization Group ID integer identifying the customer or container(Required)

parameters.name: moduleType
parameters.description: Module type of the blob. For application blobs, module type is required and should be set as Application.

parameters.name: fileLink
parameters.description: Path of the file to upload. Required if blob file is not submitted

parameters.name: accessVia
parameters.description: Access type. If EIS, content gateway ID is required and validated for the Organization Group Id

parameters.name: contentGatewayId
parameters.description: Content Gateway ID of the repository to save to. Required if accessVia is EIS.

parameters.name: downloadfilefromlink
parameters.description: Set to true if application needs to be downloaded from the link.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: required when accessVia is EIS and downloadfilefromlink is true

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: required when accessVia is EIS and downloadfilefromlink is true

parameters.name: SHA256FileHash
parameters.description: SHA-256 of the file to validate the integrity of the downloaded file from the link.

400.description: 1.{7019: File is not attached} 2.{400: Invalid blob type provided} 3.{400: Invalid Module type.} 4.{7014: UploadViaLink should have handler http(s) or content gateway should be selected} 5.{7605: Unable to download the file from the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 6.{7606: Unable to fetch the file size for the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 7.{8165: FileHash of downloded file doesn't match with the provided filehash. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 8.{6: FileName vannot be null.} 9.{8175: File hash is required while upload via link and download file from link is disabled.} 10.{8176: The provided file hash is not valid.} 11.{8177: Unable to access the file.}

422.description: 1.{7021: External repository credentials are invalid} 2.{7601: File storage is disabled at current organization group} 3.{7602: Uploading file exceeds database file size limit set at current organization group} 4.{7603: Uploading file exceeds maximum file size limit set at current organization group} 5.{7604: Uploading file exceeds maximum storage limit set at current organization group}

get.summary: Gets a blob stream by UUID
get.description: Returns the contents of a blob as a byte array using UUID.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Identifier of the blob to be retrieved, specified as a UUID.(Required)

403.description: 1.{11: User is not authorized to download the requested blob.} 2.{6: Resource's organization group :{0} not found or user does not have access to this organization group.}

get.description: An endpoint that gets application details which includes application name, identifier, description, etc... supports both searching applications (when 'app' parameter is provided) and listing all applications (when no 'app' parameter). Supports pagination, platform filtering, and localization.

parameters.name: app
parameters.description: Search query string for filtering applications by package name, package identifier, publisher name, tags, or moniker. If this parameter is omitted, the endpoint returns a paginated list of all available applications.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of applications to return per page. Must be between 1 and 100. Default is 50 for listing operations and 20 for search operations.

parameters.name: pageKey
parameters.description: Pagination continuation token obtained from the previous response's 'pageKey' field. Use this to retrieve the next page of results in a paginated query.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Filter applications by target platform using exact match. Restricts results to applications that support the specified platform.

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description:
Preferred locale code for localized application descriptions and metadata (e.g., 'en-US', 'fr-FR', 'de-DE'). 
            The system will attempt to return content in the requested locale, falling back to en-US, then the application's default locale, then the first available localized description.

200.description: OK - Successful operation - Applications retrieved successfully returns either search results or a paginated list of all applications based on the presence of search parameters.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters Occurs when request parameters are malformed, out of valid range, or contain invalid values. 1. { 5008: Platform name is invalid. } 2. { 200014: PageSize must be a positive numeric value. } 3. { 1600008 : Search Text length cannot exceed {0} characters. }

401.description: Unauthorized 1. {1004: The Authorization header is null or empty.} 2. {1005: An error occurred while validating remote service client credentials or user not found.} 3. {1005: Unable to resolve organization group id for the remote service client credentials.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.} 2. {1013: Api tenant code header is missing.} 3. {1013: Tenant code provided does not identify an Organization Group.} 4. {1014: Rest API access is disabled.} 5. {1014: This tenant is currently suspended. Please contact your VMWare Sales Representative in order to correct this state.} 6. {1030: Tenant code provided is in different tenant hierarchy compared to logged in user.} 7. {1032: Invalid API tenant-code type.} 8. {1054: Tenant Identifier in header is invalid.}

404.description: Not Found Not Found - Package or version does not exist The specified package identifier or version could not be found in the enterprise repository. 1. { 7000: Applications not found.}

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error occurred Indicates a server-side error during request processing that prevented successful completion.

post.description: Search for multiple applications by a list of PackageIdentifiers. This endpoint allows efficient retrieval of multiple applications in a single request, with support for platform filtering and localization. Returns both found applications and a list of PackageIdentifiers that were not found.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Bulk search request containing package identifiers and optional filters(Required)

200.description: OK - Successful operation - Applications retrieved successfully. Returns found applications and any PackageIdentifiers that were not found in the repository.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters Occurs when the request body is malformed, contains invalid PackageIdentifiers, or has invalid filter parameters. 1. { 1036: Request is not valid. }

401.description: Unauthorized 1. {1004: The Authorization header is null or empty.} 2. {1005: An error occurred while validating remote service client credentials or user not found.} 3. {1005: Unable to resolve organization group id for the remote service client credentials.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.} 2. {1013: Api tenant code header is missing.} 3. {1013: Tenant code provided does not identify an Organization Group.} 4. {1014: Rest API access is disabled.} 5. {1014: This tenant is currently suspended. Please contact your VMWare Sales Representative in order to correct this state.} 6. {1030: Tenant code provided is in different tenant hierarchy compared to logged in user.} 7. {1032: Invalid API tenant-code type.} 8. {1054: Tenant Identifier in header is invalid.}

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error occurred Indicates a server-side error during request processing that prevented successful completion. 1. { 3021: Internal server error. }

get.summary: New - Get applications details for the version
get.description:
Retrieve comprehensive information about a specific application package and version. 
This endpoint provides detailed metadata, installer information, dependencies, and version history 
for enterprise application management and deployment planning.

parameters.name: packageId
parameters.description: Unique package identifier that distinguishes the application package within the enterprise repository. This is typically in reverse domain notation format (e.g., 'Microsoft.VisualStudioCode').(Required)

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Specific version string of the package to retrieve. The version must match exactly as stored in the repository.(Required)

200.description: OK - Successful operation - application details retrieved successfully Returns comprehensive package information including metadata, installer details, dependencies, and version information.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters Occurs when request parameters are malformed, out of valid range, or contain invalid values. 1. { 8063: PackageIdentifier cannot be null or empty. } 2. { 5125: Application Version Cannot Be Null Or Empty. } 3. { 200014: PageSize must be a positive numeric value. }

401.description: Unauthorized 1. {1004: The Authorization header is null or empty.} 2. {1005: An error occurred while validating remote service client credentials or user not found.} 3. {1005: Unable to resolve organization group id for the remote service client credentials.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: User doesn't have sufficient permissions to perform this operation.} 2. {1013: Api tenant code header is missing.} 3. {1013: Tenant code provided does not identify an Organization Group.} 4. {1014: Rest API access is disabled.} 5. {1014: This tenant is currently suspended. Please contact your VMWare Sales Representative in order to correct this state.} 6. {1030: Tenant code provided is in different tenant hierarchy compared to logged in user.} 7. {1032: Invalid API tenant-code type.} 8. {1054: Tenant Identifier in header is invalid.}

404.description: Not Found Not Found - Package or version does not exist The specified package identifier or version could not be found in the enterprise repository. 1. { 7000: Applications not found.}

500.description: Internal Server Error - Unexpected server error occurred A server-side error prevented the successful retrieval of package details. 1. { 3021: Internal server error. }

post.summary: New - Uploads the specified package into UEM.
post.description: Uploads the specified package into UEM by retrieving download URL from Enterprise App Repository.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: package information containing packageidentifier, version, architecture, installertype.(Required).

200.description: OK - Successful - Applications Uploaded successfully. Returns blobIds of the application and icon.

206.description: Partial Content - Applications Uploaded successfully but failed to upload icon.

400.description: Bad Request 1. {8177: Unable to access the file.}

post.summary: New - Imports the specified application with default settings into UEM.
post.description: Imports the specified application into UEM by retrieving download URL from Enterprise App Repository.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: package information containing packageidentifier, version, architecture, installertype.(Required)

206.description: Partial Content - The application was successfully imported, but some components could not be loaded.

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid request parameters Occurs when the request body is malformed. 1. {6: Invalid architecture specified. Valid values are: x86, x64, arm64. arm, neutral.} 2. {6: Invalid installer type specified. Valid values are: Exe, Msi, Inno, NullSoft, Wix, Burn.} 3. {6: Invalid installation scope specified. Valid values are: User, Machine.} 4. {8063: PackageIdentifier cannot be null or empty when resource type is APPS.} 5. {5125: Application Version Cannot Be Null Or Empty.} 6. {1036: Request is not valid.} 7. {7605: Unable to download the file from the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 8. {7606: Unable to fetch the file size for the link. Please provide a valid link to proceed} 9. {8165: FileHash of downloded file doesn't match with the provided filehash. Please provide a valid link to proceed.} 10. {8177: Unable to access the file.}

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication is missing or invalid. Please ensure you provide correct credentials. 1. {1005: Unable to resolve organization group id for the remote service client credentials.}

403.description: Forbidden 1. {1011: Your user account may not have the required permissions to perform this action.} 2. {1013: The request is missing a valid tenant code. Please ensure the tenant information is correct.} 3. {1014: API access for your tenant has been disabled. Please contact support to enable access.} 4. {1014: Your tenant is currently suspended. Please contact Omnissa support to resolve the issue.}

500.description: Internal Server Error - Something went wrong on our end. Indicates an unexpected internal error occurred while processing the request.

get.summary: New - Details of an internal app identified by UUID.
get.description: Gets the details of an internal app identified by UUID.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Application UUID(Required)

401.description: 1.  {7000: AppNotFoundOrUnauthorized - Application not found or user is not authorized to access it.}

put.summary: New - Renew the provisioning profile of all the applications using the given provisioning profile.
put.description: Renews the provisioning profile all the applications using the given provisioning profile.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the ptovisioning profile which has to be renewed.(Required)

400.description: 1.  {6: NoFileOrAppUuids - One or all of the input parameter is not provided. Please check if the key (provisioningFile and appUuids) for input parameter is correct.} 2.{7026: InvalidApplicationList - Application List is Empty.} 3.{7027: InvalidRequestKey - Invalid Key (app_uuids) for Application List JSON Request.} 4.{7028: InvalidFileSize - File is too big/small. Size must be between 0MB to 1MB.} 5.{7029: InvalidProvisioningProfileType - Attached file is not a provisioning profile.} 6.{7030: InvalidProvisioningProfileForApps - One of the Provisioning Profile is not valid for following app UUID(s).(List of all Invalid appUuids).}

401.description: 1.  {6: ProvisioningProfileNotFoundOrUnauthorized - Provisioning Profile is not found or user is not authorized to access it.}

get.summary: New - Gets the BranchCache statistics for the application bundle identifier.
get.description: Gets the BranchCache statistics for application deployments for the application bundle.

parameters.name: bundleid
parameters.description: The application bundle identifier to query BranchCache statistics.(Required)

parameters.name: summary_only
parameters.description: Only the summary of the BranchCache statistics for the application deployments is returned. This is the default behavior if not specified.

parameters.name: application_uuids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of application UUIDs for the BranchCache statistics of the applications deployed to devices. At least one application must be part of the application bundle.

parameters.name: device_uuids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of device UUIDs for the BranchCache statistics of the applications deployed to those devices. Must not be specified with smart_group_uuids.

parameters.name: smart_group_uuids
parameters.description: Comma separated list of smart group UUIDs for the BranchCache statistics of the applications deployed to those smart groups. Must not be specified with device_uuids.

parameters.name: organization_group_uuid
parameters.description: The organization group to limit the BranchCache statistics query to.

400.description: 1. {6: ApplicationBundleIdInvalid - Application Bundle Id is Invalid.} 2. {6: InvalidApplicationUuid - Invalid application UUID.} 3. {6: InvalidDeviceUuid - Device not found for device UUID or not valid UUID.} 4. {6: InvalidSmartGroup - Invalid Smart Group.} 5. {6: InvalidOrganizationGroupUUID - Invalid Organization Group UUID format.} 6. {6: P2PBranchCacheStatisticsQueryBothDeviceAndSmartGroupsSpecifiedInvalid - Cannot specify both device UUIDs and smart group UUIDs for BranchCache statistics.} 7. {6: P2PBranchCacheStatisticsSummaryOnlyParameterInvalid - The parameter for summary only of BranchCache statistics is invalid.}

404.description: 1. {7000: ApplicationNotFound - Application not found.} 2. {7000: OrganizationGroupNotFoundOrNotAuthorized - Requested Organization Group was not found or user is not authorized to access it.}

get.summary: New - Get purchased application and assignment details
get.description: Retrieve the details of a license-based purchased application and its assignments.

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: Purchased application's UUID(Required).

400.description: 1. {7112 : Application only has redemption codes, please use the V1 version to get its details.} 2. {6 : Application Uuid cannot be null or empty.}

404.description: 1. {6: Purchased application with uuid:{uuid} is not found or user doesn't have access to it.}

post.summary: New - Install the specified purchased application on the device.
post.description: Install the specified purchased application on the device.

parameters.name: applicationUuid
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the purchased app to be installed on the device.(Required).

parameters.name: deviceInfo
parameters.description:
Details of the device on which the Application to be installed.
            Accepted format is **guid**
            E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073(Required).

400.description: 1. {6 : Application Uuid cannot be null or empty. } 2. {6 : Device Information cannot be null. }

403.description: 1. {11 : User does not have permission to perform this operation.}

404.description: 1. {7000: Application not found.} 2. {404 : Device not found for this request.}

500.description: 1. {20 : Application is not assigned to this device.}

post.summary: New - Remove the specified purchased application from the device.
post.description: Remove the specified purchased application from the device.

parameters.name: applicationUuid
parameters.description: Unique Identifier for the purchased app to be removed from the device.(Required).

parameters.name: deviceInfo
parameters.description:
Details of the device to uninstall the application from.
            Accepted format is **guid**
            E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073(Required).

400.description: 1. {6 : Application Uuid cannot be null or empty. } 2. {6 : Device Information cannot be null. }

403.description: 1. {11 : User does not have permission to perform this operation.}

404.description: 1. {8 : Device not found for this request. Application not found}

post.summary: New - Assigns Smart Groups to an BSP Application.
post.description: Assigns smartgroup identified by the smartgroup id to the BSP application.

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application Id.

parameters.name: offlinesmartgroupid
parameters.description: Offline smart group Identifier.

parameters.name: onlinesmartgroupid
parameters.description: Online smart group Identifier.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type is {harmony/airwatch}.

400.description: 1. {7002: Parameter Type cannot be null or empty}2. {7002: Invalid parameter type {type}}

403.description: 1. {7401: SmartGroup with Id {smartgroupid} not found or user does not have access to it.}2. {7402: Public Application with Id : {applicationid} does not exist or cannot be assigned to the listed smartgroups.}

PartialContentRange.description: Gets or sets partial content range.

FileName.description: Gets or sets FileName {Will be set in the content-disposition header}.

AcceptsByteRanges.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets a value which indicates whether a range byte request for a stream is accepted or not.

SendETagHeaderValue.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the option to include ETagHeaderValue.

ResponseDateTimeFormat.description: Gets or sets dateTime format for response.

IRequestQuery.description:
Interface for IAwRequestQuery
This will hold all the required data for a request and will be filled from ModelBinder.

QueryParams.description: Gets or sets Query Parameters. For e.g. any query string parameters will be extracted to key,value pair and stored here.

TenantContext.description: Gets or sets IAwTenantContext. Will hold the tenant details, which will be filled as part of the tenant validation handler.

RequestMethod.description: Gets or sets RequestMethod. Will be used to write custom rules.

AllowedUriQueryChars.description: Gets or sets allowed Characters in Query String.

ITenantContext.description: Contract for TenantContext. Will be exposed from RequestQuery and will be injected to every controller actions and Business method.

TenantCode.description: Gets or sets TenantCode. Uniquely identify the tenant for the request.

OrganizationgroupId.description: Gets or sets Organization Group ID.

AppAssignmentRuleV2Model.description: List of assignments and exclusions assigned for an application.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

permission_policy_overrides.name: Precise location (GPS and network-based)
permission_policy_overrides.description: Allows the app to get your precise location using the Global Positioning System (GPS) or network location...

AppAssignmentV2Model.description: Model for assignments of an application.

priority.description: Priority of an assignment policy with 0 being the highest priority.

is_dynamic_template_saved.description: Flag to check if the assignment configuration is being saved through DDUI.

is_apple_education_assignment.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether an Apple education assignment is configured or not.
Edu assignment does not allow deletion on assignment page, this is used to group edu assignment separately
with other assignment.

is_android_enterprise_config_template.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the configuration was saved from managed configuration enterprise template.

app_profiles_mapping.description: Gets or sets a SDK profile, modular SDK profile mappings with the assignment.

MsiDeploymentOptionsV1Model.description: Assignment level msi deployment override options

device_restart.description: Gets or sets the device restart option. Supported values: DoNotRestart, ForceRestart, RestartIfNeeded.

installer_reboot_exit_code.description: Insatller Reboot Exit code of the assignment.

installer_success_exit_code.description: Insatller Success Exit code of the assignment

AppAssignmentDistributionV2Model.description: Distribution Model for assignments of an application.

bsp_assignments.description: BSP app assignments with smart groups applicable for online and offline licenses.

vpp_app_details.description: Purchased application assignments with VPP licenses.

pre_release_version.description: App pre release version applicable for Android For Work apps.

app_track_id.description: App track id for Android For Work Apps.

effective_date.description:
The effective datetime for the application in Admin's timezone. Applicable for internal application only.
If effective datetime is null or not provided then current admin's datetime will be considered.

auto_update_devices_with_previous_versio.description: Auto update devices with previous versions is applicable for Android, iOS and Windows internal apps.

display_in_app_catalog.description: Display in App Catalog flag is applicable for macOS and Windows SFD internal apps.

requires_approval.description: Requires approval flag is applicable only for Windows SFD apps.

hide_notifications.description: Hide notifications flag is applicable only for Windows SFD apps.

application_transforms.description: Collection of application transforms uuids applicable only for Windows SFD apps.

installer_deferral_allowed.description: Gets or sets whether installer deferral is allowed.

deferral_notification_type.description: Gets or sets an application installation deferral notification type.

installer_deferral_interval.description: Gets or sets the number of hours of installer deferral interval.

installer_deferral_exit_code.description: Gets or sets the installer deferral exit code.

max_deferrals.description: Gets or sets the maximum number of times installation can be deferred for UEM Deferral.

max_deferral_duration_in_days.description: Gets or sets the maximum duration until the execution can be deferred (in days).

deferral_message_headline.description: Gets or sets the deferral message headline for uem application deferral.

deferral_message_content.description: Gets or sets the deferral message content for uem application deferral.

is_default_assignment.description: Flag to check if the assignment is default.

reboot_override.description: Flag to check the reboot override option.

msi_deployment_override_params.description: Reboot option in case of override

keep_app_updated_automatically.description: Keep app updated automatically (To push the application to the eligible devices). This is supposed to be only for macOS.

auto_update_priority.description: Auto update priority. This is supposed to be only for Android and will default to null.

keep_app_on_unassignment.description: Flag to control on Unassignment app can be retained or removed.

keep_app_on_enterprise_wipe.description: Flag to control on Enterprise Wipe app can be retained or removed.

phased_deployment.description: Phased deployment associated to the assignment.

archived_phased_deployment_uuid.description: Archived phased deployment UUID when assignment was unassigned from phased deployment (direct assignment with history).

AppAssignmentRestrictionV1Model.description: Restriction Model for assignments of an application.

remove_on_unenroll.description: Removes the application from end user device when the device unenrolls and applicable for Apple, macOS and Android apps.

prevent_application_backup.description: Prevent backing up application data to iCloud(iOS only)

make_app_mdm_managed.description:
This flag allows admin to take over management of user installed application so that additional actions like Removals,
Application configuration can be applied to the end user device.  This flag is applicable for iOS and Windows SFD apps.

managed_access.description: If Managed access is enabled, by default Require Management will be enabled

desired_state_management.description: Desired state management flag and applicable for macOS SFD apps & Windows Desktop SFD apps.

prevent_removal.description:
If prevent removal is enabled, then it will  prevent an app from being removed from devices after installation
or conversion to management.

AppAssignmentTunnelV1Model.description: Tunnel Model for assignments of an application.

per_app_vpn_profile_uuid.description:
Tunnel profile UUID
Accepted formats **uuid**
E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073

afw_per_app_vpn_profile_uuid.description:
AFW Tunnel profile UUID
Accepted formats **uuid**
E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073

amapi_per_app_vpn_profile_uuid.description:
AMAPI Tunnel profile UUID
Accepted formats **uuid**
E.g. 3d958f38-246e-4854-a306-189d941ab073

key.description: The key of the application configuration

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

ApplicationDeploymentProfileMapV1Model.description: SDK profiles/Modular SDK profiles for assignments of an application.

device_profile_uuid.description: Gets or sets Device Profile Uuid.

allow_modifying_defaults.description: Indicates whether modifications to the default values are allowed. Administrator's should not modify the default values of certain trusted applications.

connected_work_and_personal_apps.description: Indicates whether work and personal versions of the app should be allowed to communicate with one another (e.g., calendar applications).

allow_home_screen_widgets.description: Indicates whether the application should be allowed to display widgets on the device's home screen.

allow_vpn_lockdown_exemption.description: Indicates whether VPN Lockdown Exemption can be enabled or disabled.

minimum_version_code.description: The minimum version code for this application

additional_application_privileges.description: The list of additional application privileges for this application.

user_control_settings.description: The user control settings to apply for this application.

default_permission_policy.description: The default permission policy to apply for this application.

permission_policy_overrides.description: List of permissions requested by this application, overriding the default permission policy. Titles and descriptions are localized to the user and organization group.

network_slice_type.description: The network slice type for application policy.

AppAssignmentBspV1Model.description: BSP app assignments with smart groups applicable for online and offline licenses.

smart_groups_online_licenses.description: Collection of smart group uuids applicable for online licenses.

smart_groups_offline_licenses.description: Collection of smart group uuids applicable for offline licenses.

AppAssignmentVppV1Model.description: Purchased application assignments with VPP licenses

uuid.description: Gets or sets UUID of the phased deployment.

phases.description: Gets or sets list of phases in the phased deployment.

tenant_uuid.description: Gets or sets the tenant UUID.

created_by.description: Gets or sets the UUID of the admin who created the deployment.

created_at.description: Gets or sets the creation timestamp of the phased deployment.

updated_by.description: Gets or sets the UUID of the admin who last updated the deployment.

updated_at.description: Gets or sets the update timestamp of the phased deployment.

status.description: Gets or sets the status of the phased deployment.

start_date.description: Gets or sets the start date of the phased deployment.

assignment_published_time.description: Gets or sets the assignment published time.

display_status.description: Gets or sets the display name of status of the phased deployment.

label_status.description: Gets or sets the labeling status.

RuntimeApplicationPermission.description: Object containing runtime permissions requested by an application.

permission_policy.description: The default permission policy for this permission.

name.description: The localized name for this permission.

description.description: The localized description for this permission.

AssignmentLicenseUsageV1Model.description: Contains information about the assignment of a purchased application.

smart_group_uuid.description: The smart group uuid assigned with the application.

uuid.description: Gets or sets uUID of the phase.

name.description: Gets or sets the name of the phase.

description.description: Gets or sets the description of the phase.

type.description: Gets or sets type of the phase.

sequence.description: Gets or sets sequence number of the phase.

progression_rule.description: Gets or sets progression rule for the phase.

progression_rule_eval_at.description: Gets or sets the time at which the progression rule is evaluated for the phase.

entitlement_rule_uuid.description: Gets or sets entitlement rule uuid for the phase.

status.description: Gets or sets the status of the phased deployment.

progression_type.description: Gets or sets the progression type for a phase in a phased deployment.

additional_properties.description: Gets or sets additional properties for the phase, which can include custom metadata or configuration settings.

started_at.description: Gets or sets the start date of the phase.

progressed_by.description: Gets or sets the admin info phased deployment was progressed by.

progressed_by_user_name.description: Gets or sets the admin info phased deployment was progressed by.

progressed_at.description: Gets or sets the time of day (with time zone) when the phase was progressed.

percentage.description: Gets or sets percentage contribution of the phase.

smart_group_uuids.description: Gets or sets list of smart groups for the phase.

exclusion_smart_group_uuids.description: Gets or sets list of smart groups excluded the phase.

PhaseProgressionRuleV1Model.description: Model for progression rules for the phase.

key.description: Key for the rule. Example: "PHASE_DURATION" or "INSTALL_RATE".

errorCode.description: Gets or sets application error code.

message.description: Gets or sets friendly error message.

activityId.description: Gets or sets transactionId of the request.

links.description: Gets or sets list of hypermedia link.

Href.description: Gets or sets hyper text reference.

Title.description: Gets or sets title of the link.

key.description: The key of the application configuration

EntityV1Model.description: The Entity Model for the blob.  Includes the numeric ID and Guid

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

applications.description: Collection of application entries matching the search criteria or representing the requested page of all applications. Each entry contains essential application metadata for display and selection purposes.

page_key.description: Opaque pagination token that can be used as the 'pageKey' parameter in subsequent requests to retrieve the next page of results. This field is null when no additional pages are available.

total_apps_count.description: Total number of applications available in the enterprise application repository.

has_more.description: Boolean indicator that specifies whether additional pages of results are available beyond the current response. Use this to determine if pagination controls should be displayed to the user.

page_count.description: Current page number in the result set, starting from 1. This field is only present for search operations and helps with pagination navigation and result context.

EnterpriseApplicationV2Model.description: Enterprise application model optimized for listing and search operations, containing essential metadata for application discovery and selection

package_identifier.description: Unique identifier for the application package used throughout the enterprise repository. This identifier follows consistent naming conventions and remains stable across package versions.

package_name.description: User-friendly display name of the application, localized according to the requested locale preferences and suitable for presentation in user interfaces.

publisher.description: Name of the software publisher, vendor, or organization responsible for the application. This provides attribution and helps users identify trusted sources.

short_description.description: Brief description of the application's primary functionality and purpose, localized based on the requested locale with fallback to available languages.

latest_version.description: Most recent version of the application available in the enterprise repository. This represents the current stable release recommended for new installations.

all_versions.description: Comprehensive list of all available versions for this application package, ordered from newest to oldest. This enables version-specific deployments and rollback scenarios.

platform.description: Primary operating system platform supported by this application package. Additional platform support may be available in specific versions.

default_locale.description: Default locale code for the application, indicating the primary language and regional settings for which the application provides the most complete localization and documentation.

icon_sha256.description: App icon hash generated with SHA256 algorithm.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the application for categorization and enhanced search capabilities. Tags help users discover applications by functionality or use case.

moniker.description: Short, memorable identifier or alias for the application that can be used as an alternative to the full package identifier for easier reference and command-line usage.

LatestVersionAppPackageModel.description: The application information for latest versioned package.

version.description: Latest version string of the package being returned.

installers.description: Collection of available installer packages for different architectures, platforms, or configurations. Each installer entry contains specific download and installation information.

LatestAppPackageInstallerInfoModel.description: The latest versioned app package installation details.

architecture.description: Target processor architecture for installer package.

installer_locale.description: Locale code indicating the primary language and regional settings for this specific installer. This may differ from the package's default locale for localized installer packages.

installer_type.description: Specific installer format and technology used by this installer package. This determines the installation behavior, required tools, and supported installation options.

BulkSearchRequestV2Model.description: Request model for bulk search operations containing package identifiers and optional filtering parameters

package_identifiers.description: List of unique package identifiers to search for in the enterprise repository. Each identifier should match the format used throughout the repository (e.g., 'Microsoft.VisualStudioCode').

platform.description: Primary operating system platform supported by this application package. Additional platform support may be available in specific versions.

locale.description:
Optional locale code for localized application descriptions and metadata (e.g., 'en-US', 'fr-FR', 'de-DE', 'cs-CZ'). 
The system will attempt to return content in the requested locale, falling back to en-US, then the application's default locale.

BulkSearchResponseV2Model.description: Response model for bulk search operations containing found applications and identifiers that were not found

applications.description: Collection of applications that were successfully found in the repository, matching the requested package identifiers and any applied filters.

not_found.description: List of package identifiers from the original request that could not be found in the enterprise repository. This helps identify missing or incorrectly specified package names.

total_apps_count.description: Total number of applications available in the enterprise application repository.

EnterpriseAppPackageResponseV2Model.description: Comprehensive response model for individual package operations, containing detailed package metadata, installer information, dependencies, and version management data

package_identifier.description: Unique identifier for the application package. This identifier remains consistent across all versions of the package.

package_version.description: Specific version string of the package being returned.

package_name.description: Human-readable display name of the application package.

publisher_name.description: Name of the organization or individual responsible for creating and maintaining the application package. This is typically the software vendor or developer.

short_description.description: Concise description of the application's primary purpose and functionality, localized according to the requested locale preferences.

default_locale.description: Primary locale code for the application package, indicating the language and region for which the package was originally developed and contains the most complete localization.

icon_sha256.description: App icon hash generated with SHA256 algorithm.

icon_file_size.description: File size of the icon in megabytes.

platform.description: List of operating system platforms supported by this package version. Each entry specifies a platform where the package can be successfully installed and executed.

minimum_os_version.description: Minimum operating system version required for successful installation and operation of the package. This helps prevent installation on incompatible systems.

installer_type.description: Format type of the package installer, indicating the installation mechanism and expected behavior.

scope.description: Installation scope determining whether the package is installed for the current user only or system-wide for all users. This affects installation permissions and package visibility.

elevation_requirement.description: Specifies the privilege elevation requirements for installing this package. This helps determine the necessary user permissions and security context for installation.

install_modes.description: List of supported installation modes that determine the level of user interaction during package installation. This allows for flexible deployment scenarios from fully automated to interactive installations.

installer_success_codes.description: Expected collection of exit codes from the installer indicating a successful installation. This is used to validate that the installation completed without errors.

expected_return_codes.description: Collection of expected return codes from the installer, mapping specific exit codes to known response types for installation outcome classification.

installers.description: Collection of available installer packages for different architectures, platforms, or configurations. Each installer entry contains specific download and installation information.

mac_installer_info.description: macOS installer package with plist information.

installer_switches.description: Collection of command-line switches and parameters that can be used to customize the installation behavior and configure installation options.

dependencies.description: Comprehensive dependency information including required system features, libraries, and other packages that must be present for successful installation and operation.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this package version was first added to the enterprise repository. This helps track package lifecycle and deployment history.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent modification to this package version's metadata or associated files. This helps identify when package information was last refreshed.

page_key.description: Pagination token for retrieving additional related information such as version history or related packages. Use this token in subsequent requests to continue pagination.

has_more.description: Boolean indicator specifying whether additional related information is available beyond the current response, such as more version history entries.

ExpectedReturnCodeV2Model.description: Represents an expected return code from an installer, mapping a specific exit code to a known response type for installation outcome classification

installer_return_code.description: Numeric exit code returned by the installer process upon completion.

return_response.description: Classification of the installer return code, describing the expected outcome or required action (e.g., rebootRequiredToFinish, systemNotSupported).

InstallerInfoV2Model.description: Detailed information about a specific installer package, including download location, architecture support, installation requirements, and configuration options

architecture.description: Target processor architecture for installer package.

installer_locale.description: Locale code indicating the primary language and regional settings for this specific installer. This may differ from the package's default locale for localized installer packages.

platform.description: List of specific platform variants supported by this installer, providing detailed compatibility information beyond the general platform classification.

minimum_os_version.description: Minimum operating system version required for this specific installer. This may be more restrictive than the general package requirements due to architecture or feature dependencies.

installer_type.description: Specific installer format and technology used by this installer package. This determines the installation behavior, required tools, and supported installation options.

installer_file_name.description: Extracted installer file name derived from the installer URL or response headers.

installer_url.description: Direct download URL for the installer package.

installer_sha256.description: SHA-256 cryptographic hash of the installer file, providing integrity verification to ensure the downloaded installer has not been modified or corrupted.

scope.description: Installation scope determining whether the application will be installed for the current user only or system-wide for all users. This affects required permissions and application visibility.

install_modes.description: List of installation modes supported by this installer, determining the level of user interaction and feedback during the installation process.

installer_success_codes.description: Expected collection of exit codes from the installer indicating a successful installation. This is used to validate that the installation completed without errors.

elevation_requirement.description: Specifies the privilege elevation requirements for installing this package. This helps determine the necessary user permissions and security context for installation.

expected_return_codes.description: Collection of expected return codes from the installer, mapping specific exit codes to known response types for installation outcome classification.

installer_switches.description: Collection of command-line switches and parameters that can be used to customize the installation behavior and configure installation options.

dependencies.description: Specific dependencies required by this installer variant, which may differ from the general package dependencies due to architecture or platform-specific requirements.

install_Command.description: Gets or sets Install command for the installers.

MacInstallerInfoV2Model.description: macOS-specific installer information including plist details and installer metadata for Apple macOS applications.

architecture.description: Target processor architecture for the macOS installer package.

installer_locale.description: Locale code indicating the primary language and regional settings for this macOS installer.

platform.description: macOS platform variant supported by this installer.

installer_type.description: Specific installer format used for this macOS package (e.g., PKG, DMG).

installer_file_name.description: Extracted installer file name derived from the installer URL or response headers.

installer_url.description: Direct download URL for the macOS installer package.

installer_sha256.description: SHA-256 cryptographic hash of the macOS installer file for integrity verification.

installer_size.description: Size of the macOS installer package in bytes.

plist_url.description: URL of the property list (plist) file associated with this macOS package.

plist_size.description: Size of the property list (plist) file in bytes.

plist_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the associated property list (plist) file.

InstallerSwitchesV2Model.description: Command-line switches and parameters for customizing installer behavior during automated deployments and enterprise installation scenarios

silent.description: Command-line switch for completely silent installation with no user interface or progress indication.

silent_with_progress.description: Command-line switch for silent installation that displays a progress indicator but requires no user interaction.

interactive.description: Command-line switch for interactive installation mode, allowing full user interaction with the installer interface. This is the default mode for manual installations.

install_location.description: Command-line parameter prefix for specifying a custom installation directory. The actual path should be appended to this switch value during installation.

log.description: Command-line parameter prefix for enabling installer logging to a specified file. The log file path should be appended to this switch value for debugging and auditing purposes.

upgrade.description: Command-line switch for performing an upgrade installation over an existing version of the application, preserving user settings and data where possible.

custom.description: Additional custom command-line switches specific to this installer that provide advanced configuration options or specialized installation behaviors.

DependencyInfoV2Model.description: Comprehensive dependency information specifying all prerequisites required for successful package installation and operation across different dependency categories

windows_features.description: List of Windows optional features that must be enabled on the target system before package installation. These are system-level features that may require administrative privileges to enable.

windows_libraries.description: Required Windows system libraries and runtime components that must be present on the target system. These are typically redistributable packages from Microsoft or other vendors.

package_dependencies.description: Other application packages from the enterprise repository that must be installed before this package. This creates an installation order dependency chain.

external_dependencies.description: External software or components that must be manually installed or configured outside of the enterprise repository. These dependencies cannot be automatically resolved by the package management system.

ScriptsModel.description: Represents a collection of script groups used for installation, uninstallation, and verification processes.

DeploymentModel.description: Represents the configuration settings for an application deployment, including restart behavior, deployment conditions, and required application closures.

condition.description: Conditional expression that determines when the application should be deployed. The expression is a string evaluated by the deployment engine, and can include checks such as OS version, or other environment variables. For example "OSVersion >= 10.0".

blocking_applications.description: List of blocking applications which must be closed prior to deployment.

PackageDependencyV2Model.description: Specification for a dependency on another package within the enterprise repository, including version requirements and compatibility constraints

package_identifier.description: Unique identifier of the required dependency package, matching the packageIdentifier format used throughout the enterprise repository.

minimum_version.description: Minimum version of the dependency package required for compatibility. Any version equal to or greater than this version will satisfy the dependency requirement.

InstallScriptsModel.description: Represents a set of scripts to be executed before and after an installation process.

UninstallScriptsModel.description: Represents a set of scripts and configuration options used to perform an uninstallation process, including pre-uninstall, main uninstall, and post-uninstall steps.

VerificationScriptsModel.description: Represents a set of scripts used to verify the installation and uninstallation state of a component.

install_check_script.description: The script used to verify whether the installation is present or valid.

uninstall_check_script.description: The script used to verify whether the application is uninstalled on the target system.

ImportPackageRequestV2Model.description: Request model for importing the specified package into UEM.

package_identifier.description: Unique package identifier to search for in the enterprise repository. The identifier should match the format used throughout the repository (e.g., 'Microsoft.VisualStudioCode').

package_version.description: Version of the application package to search for. Supports semantic versioning (e.g., '1.2.3').

architecture.description: Target system architecture for the application package.

installer_type.description: The type of installer used by the application package.

carryover_assignments.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether should Assignment Be Carried Over From Older Version Of App.

MacOsPackageInfoModel.description: Represents configuration details and script information for a macOS application package, including installation, uninstallation, and related behaviors.

install_check_script.description: Script used to verify whether the installation is present or valid.

uninstall_check_script.description: Script used to verify whether an application has been uninstalled.

pre_uninstall_script.description: Script to execute before the uninstallation process begins.

post_uninstall_script.description: Script to execute after the uninstall process completes.

uninstall_script.description: Script used to uninstall the application or component.

uninstall_method.description: Name of the method used to uninstall the application or component.

pre_install_script.description: Script to execute before the installation process begins.

post_install_script.description: Script to execute after installation is complete.

condition.description: Condition expression used to filter or evaluate items.

restart_action.description: Action to perform when a restart is required.

blocking_applications.description: List of application names that are currently blocking the operation.

ImportPackageResponseV2Model.description: Response model for blobIds returned after import.

package_blob_id.description: BlobId of the package after importing to UEM.

icon_blob_id.description: BlobId of the icon after importing to UEM.

package_info_blob_id.description: Identifier of the blob that contains package information.

application_source.description: Application source. Supported Values- AirWatch = 1, AndroidWork = 2, WindowsPhoneMarketPlace = 3, WindowsStore = 4, WindowsBusinessStore = 5, AndroidAvenger = 6, Boxer = 7, EnterpriseAppRepository = 8.

push_mode.description: Gets or sets push mode of the application (Required). Supported values: Auto, OnDemand.

Name.description: Gets or sets the model name.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

Name.description: Gets or sets the category name.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

SmartGroupId.description: Gets or sets the smart group id.

SmartGroupUuid.description: Gets or sets the Smart Group uuid.

SmartGroupName.description: Gets or sets the smart group name.

PushMode.description: Gets or sets the push mode for the application.

EffectiveDate.description: Gets or sets the effective date time for the Application.

RemoveOnUnEnroll.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the appslication should be removed on unenrollment.

ApplicationBackup.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether application backup is enabled.

AutoUpdateDevicesWithPreviousVersion.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the newest version of the app should be pushed to devices that have already downloaded the app.

PerAppVpn.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the per app VPN flag for iOS devices is enabled.

VpnProfileId.description: Gets or sets the VPN profile id associated with the application.

AfwVpnProfileId.description: Gets or sets the Android For Work VPN profile id associated with the application.

AmapiVpnProfileId.description: Gets or sets the Android Management API VPN profile id associated with the application.

VpnProfileUuid.description: Gets or sets the VPN Profile ID associated with the application.

Rank.description: Gets or sets the application rank.

AppConfig.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether custom application configuration keys and values should be sent to the device.

AppAttribute.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether custom application attribute keys and values should be sent to the device.

PreventRemoval.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether prevent application removal attribute keys and values should be sent to the device.

AllowManagement.description: Gets or sets flag to enable assume management for user installed iOS Apps.

AppConfigs.description: Gets or sets the app configs.

AppAttributes.description: Gets or sets the app attributes.

ApplicationTransformIds.description: Gets or sets The application transforms ids attached to the application.

VisibleInAppCatalog.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the value whether to display in app catalog.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

CommandLineArguments.description: Gets or sets command line options to be used when calling MSIEXEC.exe.

InstallTimeoutInMinutes.description:
Gets or sets amount of time, in minutes that the installation process can run before the installer
considers the installation may have failed and no longer monitors the installation operation.Range 0-60.

RetryCount.description: Gets or sets the number of times the download and installation operation will be retried before the installation will be marked as failed. With a limit of ‘10' attempts.

RetryIntervalInMinutes.description: Gets or sets amount of time, in minutes between retry operations. Range 0-10.

MacOsSoftwareDeploymentSummaryModel.description: Summary model for the macOs Software pacakge.

Pkginfo.description: Gets or sets the pkginfo file as string.

IsManaged.description: Gets or sets whether the installation type is managed or optional.

Type.description: Gets or sets configuration value type, String = 1, Integer = 2, Boolean = 3, Choice = 9, Multiselect = 10, Hidden = 11, Bundle = 15, BundleArray = 16.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

WhenToInstallApiModel.description: A model class for when to install options.

DiskSpaceRequiredInKb.description: Gets or sets the disk space required for installation of the package in KB.

DevicePowerRequired.description: Gets or sets the device power required for installation of the package. Valid range 0 - 100.

RamRequiredInMb.description: Gets or sets the RAM required for the installation of the page in MB.

HowToInstallApiModel.description: A model class for how to install options.

InstallContext.description: Gets or sets install context (Supported values:  Device, User) where the package has to be installed.

InstallCommand.description: Gets or sets the install command to install a package using the command line ex: "/quiet".

AdminPrivileges.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether admin privileges are needed for the installation of a package.

DeviceRestart.description: Gets or sets the device restart option. Supported values: DoNotRestart, ForceRestart, RestartIfNeeded.

UninstallDeviceRestart.description: Gets or sets the uninstall device restart option. Supported values: DoNotRestart, ForceRestart, RestartIfNeeded.

RetryCount.description: Gets or sets the number of times package installation operation will be retried. Valid range 0 - 10.

RetryIntervalInMinutes.description: Gets or sets the amount of time in minutes between retry operations.  Valid range 0 - 10.

InstallTimeoutInMinutes.description: Gets or sets the amount of time in minutes that the installation process can run before the installer considers the installation may have failed. Valid range 0 - 60.

InstallerRebootExitCode.description: Gets or sets the success exit code.

InstallerSuccessExitCode.description: Gets or sets the success exit code.

RestartDeadlineInDays.description: Gets or sets the numbers days after which device is force restarted.

Name.description: Gets or sets the name of the dependency.

ApplicationDependencyId.description: Gets or sets the application dependency id.

AppTransformModel.description: Transform for a MSI file uploaded.

AppPatchModel.description: Patch for a MSI file uploaded.

PatchType.description: Gets or sets the type of the uploaded patch. Supported values : Additive, Cumulative.

CommandToRunTheScript.description: Gets or sets command to run the script.

CustomScriptFileBlodId.description:
Gets or sets the blob id of the script file associated.
Supported file types : js, jse, ps1, ps1xml, psc1, psd1, psm1, pssc, cdxml, vbs, vbe, wsf, wsc.

SuccessExitCode.description: Gets or sets the success exit code.

CustomScriptApiModel.description: Model class for the application uninstall process section applicable for .exe/.msi application(s).

UninstallCommand.description: Gets or sets the application uninstall command provided.

UninstallScriptBlobId.description:
Gets or sets the id value of the uninstall script file uploaded on the console.
Supported file types : js,jse,ps1,ps1xml,psc1,psd1,psm1,pssc,cdxml,vbs,vbe,wsf,wsc.

AppCriteriaApiModel.description: Model for application criteria modal dialog.

ApplicationIdentifier.description: Gets or sets the identifier of the application.

VersionCondition.description: Gets or sets the version condition. Supported values- Any, EqualTo, NotEqualTo, GreaterThan, GreaterThanEqualTo, LessThan, LessThanEqualTo.

MinorVersion.description: Gets or sets the minor version of the application.

RevisionNumber.description: Gets or sets the fix version of the application.

SupportedModels.description: Gets or sets The supported models of the app.

SupportedModelsName.description: Gets or sets The names of supported models of the app.

MinimumOperatingSystem.description: Gets or sets minimum Operating System Version of the application.

AppSizeInKB.description: Gets or sets the size of the application in kilo bytes.

CategoryList.description: Gets or sets the application category list.

Comments.description: Gets or sets the comments for the application.

ApplicationUrl.description: Gets or sets the URL of the application.

Sdk.description: Gets or sets A value indicating whether the application uses AirWatch Software Development Kit.

SdkProfileId.description: Gets or sets the SDK profile id of the app if it uses SDK Profile.

SdkProfileUuid.description: Gets or sets sdk Profile Uuid of the App if it uses SDK Profile.

DevicesAssignedCount.description: Gets or sets the number of devices to which current application is Assigned.

DevicesInstalledCount.description: Gets or sets devices on which current application is installed.

DevicesNotInstalledCount.description: Gets or sets number of devices to which current application is assigned, but not installed.

Rating.description: Gets or sets user rating of the app.

ChangeLog.description: Gets or sets the change log for the application.

RenewalDate.description: Gets or sets expiration date of the Device Provisioning Profile.

ExcludedSmartGroupIds.description: Gets or sets the Smart group Ids to be excluded from receiving the application.

ExcludedSmartGroupGuids.description: Gets or sets the Unique Guid values of the excluded smart groups.

MsiDeploymentParameters.description: Gets or sets msi deployment param model. This is valid only for MSI files when Software Distribution is not enabled.

DeploymentOptions.description: Gets or sets application deployment options for software distribution.

FilesOptions.description: Gets or sets application files options.

MacOsSoftwareDeploymentSummary.description: Gets or sets macOs software package summary.

LargeIconBlobGUID.description: Gets or sets the GUID for the large icon blob.

MediumIconBlobGUID.description: Gets or sets the GUID for the medium icon blob.

SmallIconBlobGUID.description: Gets or sets the GUID for the small icon blob.

ApplicationFileHash.description: Gets or sets the file hash for the binary blob.

ApplicationFileBlobGUID.description: Gets or sets the GUID for the application blob.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

ApplicationsProvisionProfileModel.description: A list of applications using the same provisioning profile.

CreationDate.description: date on which the provisioning profile was created

ExpirationDate.description: date on which the provisioning profile will expire

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

ApplicationBranchCacheStatisticsModel.description: The BranchCache statistics for the application deployments.

branchcache_statistics.description: A summary of the BranchCache statistics for the application deployments.

devices.description: List of BranchCache statistics of each device for an application deployment.

BranchCacheStatisticsSummaryModel.description: Summary of the BranchCache statistics for the application deployments.

total_devices_branchcache_mode_enabled.description: Total number of devices with BranchCache mode enabled i.e. BranchCache mode on device is distributed/local/hosted

total_devices_utilized_branchcache.description: Total number of devices that utilized BranchCache in the application deployments i.e. application bytes from cache/peers was greater than zero for those devices.

total_devices_not_utilized_branchcache.description: Total number of devices that did not utilize BranchCache in the application deployments i.e. application bytes from cache/peers was equal to zero for those devices.

total_device_count.description: Total number of devices that have the applications installed.

total_cache_bytes.description: Total number of bytes from the cache/peers for the application downloads for all devices.

total_server_bytes.description: Total number of bytes from the server for the application downloads for all devices.

total_savings_percent.description: The savings as a percentage that is the bytes downloaded from the cache/peers over total application sizes for the device(s).

DeviceBranchCacheStatisticsModel.description: The BranchCache statistics for the application deployments for a specific device.

device_uuid.description: The device UUID of the device to be queried.

download_sources.description: The download sources that was used for an application download for that device.

branchcache_enabled.description: If BranchCache was leveraged for the application download for that device.

client_mode.description: The configured BranchCache mode for the device.

hosted_servers.description: The list of hosted server names if the device is configured in Hosted mode.

cache_bytes.description: The number of bytes from the cache/peers for the application download for that device.

server_bytes.description: The number of bytes from the server for the application download for that device.

PurchasedApplicationV2Model.description: Contains information about a purchased application and its assignments.

vpp_app_eligibility.description: Type of licensing that the application is eligbile for.

licenses_summary.description: Licenses summary of the purchased application.

LicensesSummaryV2Model.description: Contains information about the licenses summary of a purchased application.

VppAssignmentV2Model.description: Contains information about the assignment of a purchased application.

smart_group_uuid.description: The smart group uuid assigned with the application.

is_active.description: Indicates whether the assignment is active.

VppDeploymentParametersV2Model.description: Contains information about the application deployment parameters.

remove_on_unenroll.description: Indicates whether to remove the application on device's unenrollment.

prevent_application_backup.description: Indicates whether to prevent the application's backup.

allow_management.description: Indicates whether to assume management of the user installed application.

use_vpn.description: Indicates whether to use the VPN profile.

send_application_configuration.description: Indicates whether to send the application configuration.

send_application_attributes.description: Indicates whether to send the application attributes.

prevent_removal.description: Indicates whether to send the prevent removal application attributes.

ApplicationConfigurationV2Model.description: Contains information about the application configuration.

DeviceInformationV2Model.description: Contains information about the device on which the application to be installed.
